_meta.notes: Derived from the current data/ snapshots. Status categories: ok, manual, degraded, setup_required, failed.

wfp_hungermap.label: WFP HungerMap LIVE
wfp_hungermap.notes: fcs_pct = % population with poor/borderline food consumption (from fcs fraction). ipc_phase3plus_pct = % in IPC Phase 3+. alerts = boolean flags from WFP HungerMap. Parsed 258 countries.

wfp_country.label: WFP HungerMap per-country
wfp_country.notes: Per-country FX (90d change vs USD), food + headline inflation, child wasting/stunting. Flags: fx_currency_shock = local currency fell >10% vs USD in 90d; inflation_shock = food inflation >15%. Covered 172 of 195 requested countries.

ipc.label: IPC via HungerMap mirror
ipc.notes: Phase 3 = Crisis, Phase 4 = Emergency, Phase 5 = Catastrophe/Famine. Covered 52 countries.

worldbank_wdi.label: World Bank WDI
worldbank_wdi.notes: Most-recent-value per indicator per country. Indicator codes per WDI metadata.

worldbank_pink_sheet.label: World Bank Pink Sheet
worldbank_pink_sheet.source: World Bank Commodity Markets Pink Sheet (https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/74e8be41ceb20fa0da750cda2f6b9e4e-0050012026/related/CMO-Historical-Data-Monthly.xlsx)
worldbank_pink_sheet.notes: Monthly nominal USD benchmark prices parsed from the World Bank Pink Sheet historical workbook. Used for commodity cards and live market benchmarks.

fao_ffpi.label: FAO Food Price Index
fao_ffpi.notes: Freshest official monthly nominal FFPI CSV resolved from the FAO Food Price Index page; legacy fallback retained only if newer source is unavailable.

eurostat_food.label: Eurostat food HICP
eurostat_food.notes: Annual rate of change in food + non-alcoholic beverages CPI per EU member state. inflation_shock = food HICP > 8.0% (lower EU threshold). Covered 30 countries.

faostat_food.label: FAOSTAT food CPI
faostat_food.notes: Could not obtain guest token: GET https://faostatservices.fao.org/api/v1/auth/guest failed after 3 attempts: 403 Client Error: Forbidden for url: https://faostatservices.fao.org/api/v1/auth/guest

reliefweb_alerts.label: ReliefWeb
reliefweb_alerts.source: ReliefWeb v2 (api.reliefweb.int) — appname=vreeken-foodshield-7k3n — theme: Food and Nutrition

acled.label: ACLED
acled.notes: Set ACLED_API_KEY + ACLED_EMAIL secrets to enable.

comtrade_staples.label: UN Comtrade Plus
comtrade_staples.notes: Top 5 suppliers per importer-commodity. ~25 priority importers (free-tier quota). Succeeded: 116, skipped: 0.

feeding_america_states.label: Feeding America
feeding_america_states.source: Feeding America — Map the Meal Gap 2025 release (data year 2023, published May 14, 2025)
feeding_america_states.notes: Next release scheduled late July 2026 (will contain data year 2024). Source: https://www.feedingamerica.org/research/map-the-meal-gap/overall-executive-summary. Provenance class: MANUAL (hand-maintained from annual public release).

openmeteo.label: Open-Meteo Weather
openmeteo.notes: Past-14-day weather summary per country capital. precip_anomaly_pct compares 7d vs 30d normalised total. Flags: drought=anomaly<-50% + dry soil; wet=anomaly>+100%; heat=temp_anom>+3°C. Covered 192/195 countries.

openmeteo_flood.label: Open-Meteo Flood
openmeteo_flood.notes: River discharge anomalies for 30 flood-exposed countries. flood_flag = 7d mean discharge >+75% vs 30d baseline.

usgs_water.label: USGS Water Services
usgs_water.notes: Instantaneous gage height + 7d discharge change for 17 major US river gages. flow_anomaly: low=<-25% drop (drought signal), high=>+50% rise (flood signal).

wb_wfso.label: World Bank WFSO (Food Security Outlook)
wb_wfso.source: World Bank — World Food Security Outlook (microdata.worldbank.org/api/tables/data/fcv/wfso)
wb_wfso.notes: Quarterly food-security outlook with historical 1999–2025, preliminary 2026, and baseline+downside projections 2027–2031. Methodology: Andrée et al. (2020). Covered 191 countries × up to 8 indicators × up to 33 years. Crisis-Affected Population numbers represent IPC/CH Phase 3+ populations (3-year centered average, smoothed).

net_food_trade.label: FAOSTAT TCL net food trade
net_food_trade.notes: Net agri-food trade balance per country in millions USD. Positive = net exporter, negative = net importer. Item 1842 (Food, Total) preferred; 1841 (Agricultural Products, Total) used as fallback for countries where 1842 is missing. Covered 0 of 174 mapped countries. Most-recent year per country where both export and import values are populated and not flagged as missing.

worldbank_bulk.label: World Bank WDI bulk (20 indicators)
worldbank_bulk.notes: 20 indicators × ~201 countries. Most-recent non-null year per (country, indicator). Source refreshes quarterly upstream (Jan, Apr, Jul, Oct); we re-download every 6h but the file rarely changes between WB releases. ISO3-only — WB aggregates (WLD, EUU, HIC, etc.) are filtered out.

usda_psd.label: USDA PSD staples (wheat/rice/corn/soybeans)
usda_psd.notes: Observed production / imports / exports / consumption / stocks per country per staple per marketing year. Latest marketing year per (country, commodity, attribute). Values in 1000 metric tonnes. Commodities: wheat, rice (milled), corn, soybeans. 136 countries covered. Source refreshes monthly on WASDE release day; cron pulls every 6h but upstream data rarely changes between WASDE windows.

ndgain.label: ND-GAIN climate vulnerability + readiness
ndgain.notes: All bulk-download URLs failed; ND-GAIN hosts the dataset behind a session-scoped redirect that needs browser-style fetching. Manual download: https://gain.nd.edu/our-work/country-index/download-data/ — drop resources.zip into data/ndgain_resources.zip and re-run.

aqueduct.label: WRI Aqueduct 4.0 water risk
aqueduct.notes: Country water risk scores from WRI Aqueduct 4.0 (Aug 2023 release). 5 indicators per country: baseline water stress, baseline water depletion, drought risk, riverine flood risk, coastal flood risk. Each indicator has a 0-5 continuous score and a -1 to 4 categorical bucket (-1 = arid/no data, 0 = Low, 4 = Extremely High). Covered 0 countries. Aqueduct refreshes every 3-5 years upstream.

inform_risk.label: EU JRC INFORM Risk Index
inform_risk.notes: Could not locate header row in sheet 'Data'.

wgi.label: WB Worldwide Governance Indicators
wgi.notes: 6 governance dimensions per country, latest year. Score range -2.5 (worst) to +2.5 (best). Annual release each September. Covered 0 countries. Indicators: Control of Corruption, Government Effectiveness, Political Stability, Regulatory Quality, Rule of Law, Voice & Accountability. 6 indicator(s) failed: ['CC.EST', 'GE.EST', 'PV.EST', 'RQ.EST', 'RL.EST', 'VA.EST']

daily_summary.label: FoodShield daily 'what changed' summary
daily_summary.source: FoodShield daily summary (composite of nowcast + IPC + FFPI + Open-Meteo + INFORM)
daily_summary.notes: Deterministic text built from actual signal deltas. No LLM. Regenerates every workflow tick (6h). Surfaced at the top of the Disturbances tab.

lpi.label: WB Logistics Performance Index
lpi.notes: 7 logistics dimensions per country, latest year per indicator. Score range 1 (worst) to 5 (best). Biennial release; latest 2023 (WB skipped 2020 and 2022 due to COVID). Covered 182 countries.

hdi.label: UNDP Human Development Index
hdi.notes: Annual human-development composite + sub-indices per country. HDI score 0-1 (higher = better). Latest year populated per series. Covered 195 countries. Series: HDI, Life expectancy, Expected/Mean years of schooling, GNI per capita, Gender Inequality, Inequality-adjusted HDI, Coefficient of human inequality, Planetary-pressures HDI.

cckp.label: WB Climate Change Knowledge Portal
cckp.source: World Bank Climate Change Knowledge Portal (cckpapi.worldbank.org)
cckp.notes: Per-country climate projections under SSP2-4.5 (CMIP6 ensemble mean). Historical baseline 1991-2020 from ERA5. Projection period 2040-2059. 3 indicators: historical mean temperature (°C), projected temperature change by 2050 (°C), projected precipitation change by 2050 (%). Covered 0 countries.
